question_text: What does efficiency mean in terms of energy?

options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of energy produced

options.label: B
options.text: The fraction of energy input that is converted to useful energy output

options.label: C
options.text: The speed at which energy is used

options.label: D
options.text: The cost of energy per unit

explanation: Efficiency measures how well a device converts input energy into the useful form of energy we want. A highly efficient device wastes very little energy, while an inefficient device wastes a lot as heat or other unwanted forms.
